channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, May 31 (game #819)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, May 31 (game #1588)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, May 31 (game #1085)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs Australia: Free Streams & TV Guide for World Cup warm-up
item.description: All the ways to watch Mexico vs Australia live streams online – including for FREE – in one of the last friendlies before the World Cup gets underway.

item.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
item.description: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

item.title: Lamine Yamal shares pictures teasing the new Beats headphones on the way
item.description: The Spanish soccer player posted a bunch of images featuring the mystery product.

item.title: This weekend’s two biggest movies were both directed by YouTubers
item.description: The YouTube-to-prestige-horror pipeline is looking very strong.

item.title: ‘The system as a whole hasn’t developed a consistent, shared understanding at the same rate as the infrastructure is being deployed’: Is AI expanding beyond what we can manage today?
item.description: Rapid AI growth has caused a dangerous misalignment between infrastructure deployment and workforce expertise – the solutions are standardization and education.
